2026-04-08T18:38:57.4599673Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T18:38:57.4606418Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T18:38:57.4608438Z 
2026-04-08T18:38:57.4660463Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T18:38:57.4661469Z
